query:
ALTER TABLE work_orders 
ADD COLUMN route varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN sched_end_date varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN production_impact varchar(16) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN compliance_window_start_date varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN compliance_window_end_date varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN discipline varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN organization varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN department varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN equipment varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN class varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN reported_by varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN pm_code varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN assigned_to varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
ADD COLUMN date_created varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL;
